## How this was tested

Manual browser check (this project has no test framework).

- [ ] Opened `index.html` (or `node dev-server.js`) and verified the change
- [ ] No console errors and no `[i18n] key parity mismatch` warning
- [ ] i18n dictionaries updated for both `ja` and `en` (if any text changed)
- [ ] Kept zero dependencies, no build step, and relative asset paths
- [ ] Existing features still work (formations / drawing / tactical guides / roster / panel / shortcuts)
